indicators.name: Large bed
indicators.rationale: The large bed takes up a significant portion of the room, leaving limited space for computer work.

indicators.name: Floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a warm and comfortable surface to place a laptop.

indicators.name: Rug-merged
indicators.rationale: The rug adds comfort underfoot and can be used as a workspace.

indicators.name: Chair
indicators.rationale: The chair is ergonomic and provides support for long periods of sitting.

indicators.name: Light
indicators.rationale: The natural light from the window provides good illumination for work.

reasoning_summary: The room is moderately suitable for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a large bed, but has positive features such as a wooden floor, rug, chair, and natural lighting.
